31.reason: When EOF is reached and i>0, the last word is not returned. Should return 1 after null-terminating the word before returning 0.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Should return EOF (or -1) when end-of-file is reached without reading a word, to match the loop condition in main()
